requests.instructions: Draft the integrated benefit-risk summary for the NDA based on the pivotal Phase 3 study. Neutral, non-promotional, grounded in the CSR.

source_documents.title: Clinical Study Report STUDY-301
source_documents.text: Primary endpoint met; HbA1c reduction of 1.2 percentage points vs placebo in 450 subjects. No new safety signals.

requests.instructions: Respond to the CHMP question on hepatic safety using only the integrated safety data.

source_documents.title: Integrated Summary of Safety
source_documents.text: ALT elevations >3x ULN occurred in 1.8% of Demo-Drug vs 1.5% placebo; no Hy's Law cases.
